name: Circadian Clock Regulation
description: Circadian clock: a transcription-translation feedback loop in which CLOCK-BMAL1 drives Per/Cry expression, and accumulating PER/CRY repress their own activators, generating a self-sustaining ~24 h oscillation.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Light entrainment cue"]
    N2["CLOCK-BMAL1 activator"]
    N3["Activate Per/Cry (E-box)"]
    N4["PER/CRY accumulate"]
    N5["PER/CRY enter nucleus"]
    N6["Repress CLOCK-BMAL1"]
    N7{"Repressor threshold?"}
    N8["PER/CRY degraded (CK1)"]
    N9["Derepression; new cycle"]
    N10["~24h rhythmic output"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N7 -->|no| N5
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|new cycle| N2
    N6 --> N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Activate Per/Cry (E-box)
nodeDetails.detail: Drives transcription of Period and Cryptochrome

nodeDetails.label: PER/CRY accumulate
nodeDetails.detail: Repressor proteins build up in cytoplasm

nodeDetails.label: Repressor threshold?
nodeDetails.detail: Has repressor reached the level for turnover?

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Molecular architecture of the mammalian circadian clock
